data.name: Love and Hatred
data.detailed_description:
By some strange twist of fate, the women who bullied you in high school have returned. But you’re no longer the same person during your school years. You have developed a tortured mind with disturbing insight into human nature. What will you do with them as a recreated individual?

You play as a tormented male protagonist that’s capable of devious manipulation. Experiencing the foulness of human nature has caused you to see society from a bleak point of view. Letting you perceive weaknesses within every human.

Seal the fate of certain characters with sheer social intelligence. You will always find ways to manipulate a situation to your liking.

  • Lewd animations with immersive sound design.

  • Replay gallery to revisit lewd moments.

  • Multiple endings and outcomes shaped by your choices.

  • 4 main love interests, each with their own past and secrets.
data.about_the_game:
By some strange twist of fate, the women who bullied you in high school have returned. But you’re no longer the same person during your school years. You have developed a tortured mind with disturbing insight into human nature. What will you do with them as a recreated individual?

You play as a tormented male protagonist that’s capable of devious manipulation. Experiencing the foulness of human nature has caused you to see society from a bleak point of view. Letting you perceive weaknesses within every human.

Seal the fate of certain characters with sheer social intelligence. You will always find ways to manipulate a situation to your liking.

  • Lewd animations with immersive sound design.

  • Replay gallery to revisit lewd moments.

  • Multiple endings and outcomes shaped by your choices.

  • 4 main love interests, each with their own past and secrets.
data.short_description: Choice-driven adult visual novel where you navigate your love and sex life through a pessimistic outlook.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2.0 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2.0 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2.0 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
